name: Janus Gateway
description: Janus — general-purpose WebRTC server developed by Meetecho

seo.title: Janus Gateway — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: Janus Gateway: Janus — general-purpose WebRTC server developed by Meetecho

when_to_use: General-purpose WebRTC server for custom real-time media apps
Self-hosted SFU for video conferencing with plugin architecture
WebRTC data channels for peer-to-peer gaming connections
Recording and transcoding WebRTC sessions server-side
Building custom video platforms on open-source WebRTC stack

pros: Mature general-purpose WebRTC server (SFU and more)
Plugin architecture covers rooms, streaming, SIP
Battle-tested by Meetecho at real scale
cons: Scaling across nodes needs custom work
Not a turnkey product; you own the ops
review.verdict: Powerful and flexible WebRTC server for teams who want full control and are ready to run C-based infra.
review.best_for: Infra teams building custom WebRTC products with self-hosting
review.not_for: Startups that want a managed video API with SLAs
